headline: Boyfriend's 'I'm Listening' While Playing Video Games Has Become A Running Joke
summary: She now texts him important information because 'the controller is not a listening device.'
fullBody: Jake Multitask insists he can listen while gaming. 'I have great auditory processing,' Jake said, not looking away from his screen. His girlfriend, Emily Test, has started asking him questions like 'what did I just say?' Jake's responses include 'uh-huh,' 'that's crazy,' and 'you're so right, babe.' None of which have ever been the correct answer. Emily now sends voice notes. Jake listens to them during loading screens.
